translations.en: a paladin with a longsword on his back.
translations.zh: 背負長劍的聖騎士。

translations.en: "Good $T, $G. How art thou?"
translations.zh: 「$T好，$G。汝近來可安好？」
translations.note: art thou = are you，騎士敬語

translations.en: "I am pleased to hear that. I wish I were healthy again.
translations.zh: 「聽到此言，吾甚感欣慰。只願吾能重拾健康。

translations.en: "I see. I would that I were healthy again, too.
translations.zh: 「原來如此。吾亦盼能早日康復。

translations.en: But please, $G. Let me tell you of my @adventure."
translations.zh: 但請允許，$G，讓吾向汝述說吾的@adventure（歷險）。」
translations.note: 接在上兩個 split string 之後

translations.en: "Sir Caradon of Trinsic, at thy service."
translations.zh: 「特林希克的卡拉頓爵士，恭候差遣。」

translations.en: "I am a knight. Currently, though, I am recovering from a @battle."
translations.zh: 「吾乃騎士。然而眼下，正從一場@battle（戰鬥）中療傷復原。」

translations.en: "I've just come home from fighting in Yew. I fought gargoyles near the @shrine."
translations.zh: 「吾剛從伊尤的戰場歸來。在@shrine（聖壇）附近與魔像族交手。」

translations.en: "There I was, with ten companions. Outside the Shrine of Honesty stood two gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「當時吾與十名同伴在場。誠信神殿外，立著兩隻魔像族。」

translations.en: "I saw them drink from little vials right before they charged us."
translations.zh: 「吾見他們在衝鋒之前，各飲了一小瓶什麼東西。」

translations.en: "Large, clumsy brutes they were. They should have been easy to dispatch..."
translations.zh: 「他們是龐大笨拙的野獸，照理說應當不難對付……」

translations.en: "But they fought like cyclones!"
translations.zh: 「但他們卻像旋風般猛烈搏鬥！」

translations.en: "My captain ordered me to go to town for help when only we two and the gargoyles were left standing."
translations.zh: 「當場只剩我們兩人和那兩隻魔像族尚能站立時，隊長命令吾進城求援。」

translations.en: "Just as I was returning with some guards, I saw the monsters throwing my friends' dead bodies onto a fire."
translations.zh: 「就在吾帶著衛兵返回之時，眼見那些怪物將吾同伴的遺體投入火中。」

translations.en: "Then the gargoyles looked up at us and fell over, both @dead."
translations.zh: 「然後那兩隻魔像族抬頭望向我們，隨即倒地，雙雙@dead（斃命）。」

translations.en: "Yes, just like that: all of a sudden!"
translations.zh: 「是的，就是這樣：猝然倒斃！」

translations.en: "I only wish I could have killed them myself, for @vengeance!"
translations.zh: 「吾只恨不能親手將他們殺死，以@vengeance（復仇）！」

translations.en: "If they had not burned his body, my captain might have been resurrected."
translations.zh: 「若他們沒有焚毀遺體，吾的隊長或許還有機會復活。」

translations.en: For a moment, Caradon looks ready to weep. "The @beasts!"
translations.zh: 卡拉頓片刻間幾近落淚。「這些@beasts（野獸）！」

translations.en: "Monsters with eyes like coals and skin like rock."
translations.zh: 「眼似炭火、皮如頑石的怪物。」

translations.en: "Farewell, $G."
"I cannot help thee with that."
translations.zh: 「此事吾無能為力。」

translator_notes: 卡拉頓是特林希克聖騎士，從伊尤神殿附近的戰鬥返回療傷。他目睹兩隻魔像族飲下藥水後猛烈交戰，最後在隊長被焚屍後突然暴斃。魔像族猝死情節是重要劇情線索。騎士文體用吾/汝/彼。
